narrative:
Perry Twp township has 598 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.9 percentage points.
